title: 札幌記念の後に・三つ眼はなくとも

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the protection of the deities of the north,
Matikanefukukitaru makes her mark on the
Sapporo Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, we go out on a fun sightseeing tour of
Sapporo.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When we pass by the Sapporo Clock Tower,
Matikanefukukitaru notices that the needle is
pointing south towards the Nakayama
Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Believing this to be a sign from above, she
chooses to run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stokes her passion, determined to earn her
spot on her own merits, unlike what happened
with the Takarazuka Kinen.
